category_sources: Official sarif-rs README lists sarif-fmt as a CLI tool to pretty print SARIF diagnostics.
source_facts.description: Pretty print SARIF files to easy human readable output.
display_name_sources: Official sarif-rs README lists the subproject as sarif-fmt.
docs_sources: Official sarif-rs README documentation section links sarif-fmt to Rust documentation.
source_facts.homepage points to the official docs.rs crate documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already set to https://github.com/psastras/sarif-rs; per instruction, repo is returned as null.
tags_sources: Official sarif-rs README describes Rust SARIF projects and sarif-fmt as a CLI.
